'''Tudrath Dyn''' was a young [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]] and student of [[Czulkang Lah]]'s class on strategy. When members of the class could not answer one of Lah's questions on the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], he decided to give them all a [[Czulkang Lah pit]]. Tudrath Dyn correctly guessed the answer to Lah's question: They needed to know what the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was willing to sacrifice, so that would know how they thought. Dyn was instructed to sit, and did not receive a pit from Lah's [[amphistaff]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' {{1st}}
